description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark exterior, white-trimmed windows, and a gable roof. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, a manicured lawn, and a blossoming tree near the entrance. The house is surrounded by a tall fence and dense trees, providing privacy and a natural backdrop. The rear of the house opens to a backyard with additional greenery and a patio area. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, while the sides and back have fewer, more irregularly placed windows. The overall design is modern with traditional elements, blending into a typical residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story suburban house with a dark facade, white-trimmed windows, a gable roof, and a front driveway with a garage, surrounded by trees and fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, manicured lawn, and a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, patio area, and dense tree coverage behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall trees, with the back of the house partially obscured and fewer visible windows.
description_view_3: Side view showing the garage, side fencing, and a partial view of the front and backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on the front, irregular on sides and back
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small steps, and a covered porch adjacent to a garage
